positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, and centralized illustration of a mystical celestial forest. The composition features stylized, glowing trees with intricate root systems, intertwined with bioluminescent floral motifs and constellations. The art style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and graphic digital painting, emphasizing clean silhouettes and deep saturation. Use a color palette dominated by midnight indigo, deep teal, emerald green, and accents of metallic gold and iridescent cyan. The entire image must have a high contrast, poster-print quality suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Elements should appear slightly ethereal and glowing, but the overall structure must be clearly defined and scalable.
negative: blur, grainy, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, low resolution, poor composition, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, photorealism, gradients, gradients
